unpaid.name: Unpaid
unpaid.message: Payment pending — your application has not been paid for yet.

underpayment.name: Underpayment
underpayment.message: Underpayment detected — the full amount has not been received. Please complete your payment.

status-0.name: Waiting to assign
status-0.message: Your application has been received and is waiting to be assigned to our team.

status-1.name: Processing
status-1.message: Your application is currently being processed by our team.

status-2.name: Approved
status-2.message: Your e-visa has been approved! You should receive it by email shortly.

status-3.name: To refund
status-3.message: A refund for your application has been initiated. It may take up to 5 business days.

status-4.name: Refunded
status-4.message: Your payment has been refunded to your original payment method.

status-5.name: Incomplete
status-5.message: Your application is incomplete. Please check your email for instructions on what is missing.

status-6.name: Pending
status-6.message: Your application is pending — our team is reviewing it.

status-7.name: On hold
status-7.message: Your application is temporarily on hold. Please check your email or contact support.

status-8.name: Missing documents
status-8.message: Additional documents are required to proceed. Please check your email for details.

status-10.name: Refused
status-10.message: Unfortunately your application has been refused by the immigration authorities.

status-11.name: Via agent
status-11.message: Your application is being handled by one of our agents.

status-12.name: Pending payment
status-12.message: Payment is pending — please complete your payment to proceed.

status-13.name: Delayed
status-13.message: Your application is experiencing a delay. We apologize for the inconvenience.

status-14.name: Sensitive Data Deletion
status-14.message: Your personal data is being securely deleted as requested.

status-15.name: Travel Date Passed
status-15.message: Your travel date has passed. Please contact support if you need assistance.
